info.name: Test Management API
info.description:
Postman test collection for Test Management System API.

Credentials: username=test, password=test  
Base URL: [http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1](http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1)

Run sequentially in Collection Runner for best results. Pre-request scripts auto-configure required state for edge-case tests.

item.name: init
TC01: GET Init Message - Positive

exec: pm.test("Message contains expected API name", function () {

item.name: login
TC02: POST Login - Valid Credentials - Positive

exec: pm.test("access_token is a non-empty string", function () {

item.name: TC03: POST Login - Invalid Password - Negative

exec: pm.test("Error message indicates wrong credentials", function () {

item.name: TC04: POST Login - Missing Required Fields - Negative

exec: pm.test("Error message indicates bad request", function () {

item.name: TC05: POST Login - Wrong Content-Type - Negative

exec: pm.test("Error message indicates wrong content type", function () {

item.name: test-suite
TC06: POST Test Suite - Create - Positive
TC07: POST Test Suite - Duplicate - Negative

exec: // Set up ID-collision state: create suite2, then delete suite1
// After setup: hash_len=1, only suite2 exists.
// Main request will compute ID = hash_len+1 = 2, which already exists → 409
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ title: 'Conflict Suite' }) }

item.name: TC08: POST Test Suite - Missing Title Field - Negative

exec: // Restore clean state: delete all suites (force) then recreate the main suite
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ force: true }) }
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ title: 'API Test Suite' }) }
pm.test("Error message indicates bad request body", function () {

item.name: TC09: GET All Test Suites - Positive

exec: pm.test("At least one test suite exists", function () {

item.name: TC10: GET Test Suite by ID - Positive

exec: pm.test("Test suite has required fields", function () {
pm.test("Test suite id matches requested id", function () {
pm.test("cases field is an array", function () {

item.name: TC11: GET Test Suite by Non-Existent ID - Negative

exec: pm.test("Error message indicates suite not found", function () {

item.name: TC12: PUT Update Test Suite - Positive
TC13: PUT Update Non-Existent Test Suite - Negative

exec: pm.test("[SPEC] Expected 404 - server should return 404 for non-existent suite", function () {
// BUG: Expected per API spec: 404 'Test suite doesn't exist'

item.name: TC14: DELETE Test Suite by ID - Positive

exec: // Create a temporary suite to be deleted by this request
const uniqueTitle = 'Temp Suite For Delete ' + Date.now();
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ title: uniqueTitle }) }

item.name: TC15: DELETE Non-Existent Test Suite - Negative

exec: pm.test("[SPEC] Expected 404 - server should return 404 for non-existent suite", function () {
// BUG: Expected per API spec: 404 'Test suite doesn't exist'

TC16: POST Test Case - Create - Positive

exec: pm.test("Success message confirms test case added", function () {

exec: pm.test("Error message indicates suite not found", function () {

item.name: TC18: POST Test Case - Duplicate - Negative

exec: // Create ID-collision state: create case2 then delete case1

item.name: TC19: POST Test Case - Missing Required Field - Negative

exec: // Restore clean state: delete all test cases then recreate the main test case
pm.test("Error message indicates bad request body", function () {

exec: pm.test("At least one test case exists", function () {

exec: pm.test("Test case has required fields", function () {
pm.test("Test case id matches requested id", function () {

exec: pm.test("Error message indicates test case not found", function () {

TC24: PUT Update Non-Existent Test Case - Negative

exec: pm.test("Error message indicates test case not found", function () {

item.name: TC25: DELETE Test Suite with Linked Cases and force: false - Negative

exec: pm.test("Error message explains why delete failed", function () {
pm.test("Suite was NOT deleted (still retrievable)", function (done) {

item.name: TC26: DELETE Test Case by ID - Positive

exec: pm.test("Deleted test case is no longer retrievable", function (done) {

item.name: TC27: DELETE Non-Existent Test Case - Negative

exec: pm.test("Error message indicates test case not found", function () {

item.name: TC28: DELETE All Test Cases - Positive

exec: pm.test("Success message confirms all test cases deleted", function () {
pm.test("GET all test cases returns empty array after deletion", function (done) {

item.name: TC29: DELETE Test Suite by ID (Now Empty) - Positive
TC30: DELETE All Test Suites with force:true - Positive

exec: pm.test("All test suites removed after force delete", function (done) {
